Danilo Rojas · Senior Product Designer · UX/UI · AI-augmented

Designing products for complex systems, regulated environments, and teams that need to move faster.

Let's work together
Open to work · Remote global
Trusted by // FAA·DoD·VA·Booz Allen Hamilton·Pichincha Bank·Rappi·Juan Valdez

Evidence, not adjectives.

DAT // Metrics
18+
Years building products
15
Years in design
4
Years supporting FAA, DoD & VA programs
50+
Product initiatives delivered

"The writing is evidence of judgment."

DOC // Philosophy
01

Most teams do not lack solutions.

Teams rarely fail for lack of ideas, UI options, or tools. They fail because the problem was misdiagnosed, the constraints were never made explicit, or they shipped around the real decision. Good design reduces ambiguity before it produces screens.

02

Handoff is where judgment disappears.

Traditional handoff turns product decisions into artifacts and asks another team to reconstruct the intent later — that gap is where waste lives. The answer isn't designers pretending to be engineers; it's making judgment executable through systems, rubrics, and agents.

Selected work · 2025–2026

Three ships. Three agent-built artifacts.

Everything below was built with agents at the center of the workflow. The craft floor is mine — the leverage is the combination.

own product · paying pilots2026

EnRegla — compliance SaaS, 0 → 1.0-MVP in 40 days

SaaS de compliance multi-sede for LATAM SMBs. 0 → 1.0-MVP in production in 40 days, co-built with Claude Code using MCP servers and parallel subagents.

  • → 346 commits · 21 SQL migrations · 31 UI components · 1 edge function with cron
  • → Supabase MCP server wired into Claude Code for direct SQL + migrations
  • → Recursive DS migration (17 parts × 5 rounds) scored 78.4 → 95.6
How this shipped
Booz Allen Hamilton · Developer Portal2026

Developer Portal — design system + dark-first DS, shipped as agent-consumable skill

Two intertwined design systems for a government-facing developer platform: /te-skin, a 17-component slash-command skill that agents invoke to return ready-to-use HTML + CSS + W3C tokens; and TE Black, a dark-first enterprise DS where every semantic color carries its WCAG audit inline. Packaged, versioned, agent-ready.

  • → /te-skin — 17 components, versioned 2.0.0, HTML + CSS + JSON metadata per component
  • → TE Black — dark-first DS with WCAG ratio stored inline with every token, rejected values kept as audit trail
  • → 3-layer CSS (tokens / components / patterns), shadcn alias layer for React drop-in, Houdini + canvas mesh-gradient backgrounds
How this shipped
own product · LLM in runtime2026

Life Update Mobile — Gemini API in runtime

Personal tracking system — daily entries analyzed by Gemini in runtime, semantic distance to a 5-year plan, Steve-Jobs-style focus metrics (3 things a day). Shipped 0 → production in a day.

  • → Gemini API runtime for semantic analysis of daily entries
  • → Hybrid data model: .md files as source of truth + DB as execution engine
  • → Next.js 16 + NextAuth v5 + Prisma + Supabase, 20 commits in 24h
How this shipped
Method

How I work.

My work sits between user needs, business constraints, and execution.

I keep a running map of what I have earned, what I am investing in now, and what I am betting on next. It is how I keep improving without losing the craft floor.

Earned · 2010–2023

The craft I mastered, now commoditized
Figma masteryHand-coded UIDesign reviewsComponent librariesStyle-guide PDFs

Investing · 2024–Now

Where my hours go today
Agent orchestrationMCP serversDesign-system-as-skillRecursive critic loopsTaste as rubric

Next horizon · 12 mo

What I'm walking toward
Team-scale agent toolingAudited agent workflowsEval-driven UI
"Danilo blends design, requirements, development and AI — the unicorn most companies are looking for in this changing time. A huge boon for any team."
Alexander Giraldez |Verified
About

A long way to the surface.

I started in databases and backend, moved to frontend, then to UI, then to UX — eighteen years in product, fifteen in design. The path means I design with the whole system in mind, not just the screen. At Booz Allen Hamilton I carried that into government and compliance work for the FAA, the DoD, and the VA, where the rigor of the documentation matters as much as the interface.

Clients

Merck & Co. · Mondelēz Intl. · Banco Pichincha · Quifatex · Grupo Superior · Moderna Corp. · Azzorti · Flamingo CO. · Produbanco · Mefia · Juan Valdez

Education
  • B.Sc. Systems EngineeringEscuela Politécnica Nacional (EPN) · 2015
  • Google UX Design CertificateCoursera · 2021
  • Design ThinkingIBM · 2020
  • UX & UI Fundamental PatternsIndependent study
